title: Diced Fresh Polish Cucumber Pickle
description: A quick-fix, plant-based-friendly Polish dish featuring crispy, fresh cucumber slices in a brine
instructions: Peel the cucumber and slice it into 1/4-inch thick rounds
In a large bowl, combine the sliced cucumber and salt. Let it sit for 30 minutes to draw out excess water
Rinse the cucumber slices under running water to remove excess salt and pat them dry with paper towels
In a medium saucepan, combine the water, apple cider vinegar, maple syrup, sugar, black pepper, and dill weed. Bring to a boil over high heat
Reduce the heat to medium-low and let the brine simmer for 5 minutes
Pack the cucumber slices into a clean glass jar or container, leaving about 1 inch of space at the top
Pour the brine over the cucumber slices, making sure that they are completely covered
Let the pickles cool to room temperature, then refrigerate them for at least 2 hours before serving
Just before serving, sprinkle the pickled cucumber with garlic and serve
